title: nervilia maliana
intro: Nervilia maliana is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia, particularly found in Sri Lanka and India, known for its unique and beautiful appearance. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nervilia maliana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even treat certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in various traditional Ayurvedic remedies.
